title: Login button not responding on mobile app
description: After entering credentials, the login button just spins forever. Happens only on Android 14 devices. iOS works fine. Already cleared cache and reinstalled.

title: Subscription renewal charged twice
description: Was charged $19.99 on Nov 10 and again on Nov 15. Only one active subscription visible in account.

title: Feature request: Dark mode for dashboard
description: Love the product but staring at white background all day hurts my eyes. Dark mode would be amazing.

title: Payment failed – card declined but funds deducted
description: Tried to upgrade to Pro plan. Got 'declined' message but $99 already charged by bank. No upgrade applied.

title: PDF export shows broken layout
description: When exporting project report as PDF, tables are cut off and images are missing on pages 2–3.

title: Account locked after password reset
description: Followed reset link, set new password, now can't log in – says account locked for security.

title: Cannot attach files larger than 5MB
description: Error message says 'File too large' even though plan allows up to 25MB attachments.

title: Wrong currency displayed in billing
description: Dashboard shows prices in EUR but I'm in Canada and was previously billed in CAD.

title: App crashes when opening notifications
description: iPhone 15 Pro – app crashes instantly when I tap the notifications tab. Reproducible 100%.

title: Missing email notifications for comments
description: Teammates comment on my tasks but I don't receive any email even though setting is enabled.

title: Refund request for yearly plan
description: Purchased annual plan 4 days ago but the product doesn't meet our needs. Would like full refund.

title: 2FA code never arrives via SMS
description: Tried multiple times – no SMS received. Email 2FA works but SMS doesn't. Number is +88017xxxxxxxx.
